[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111 a
1 1100111 5
2 1101111 6
3 1111000 4
4 0100100 2
5 1101101 5
6 1100110 4
7 1100111 5

01 10 1000001 2
12 21 1100111 5 match 1 7
23 32 1100111 5 match 1 7
34 43 1101000 3
45 54 0100000 1
56 65 0100100 2 match 4
67 76 0001000 1
70 07 0000001 1

02 20 1000001 2
13 31 1101111 6 match 2
24 42 1100000 2
35 53 0100100 2 match 4
46 64 0101000 2
57 75 0000000 a
60 06 0000000 a
71 17 0011001 3

47 74 0011000 2
50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0101100 3
72 27 0000001 1

37 73 0001001 2
